name: suno-prompt-generator
description: AI-powered prompt generator for Suno AI using multi-LLM pipeline

scripts.setup: node -e "console.log('📋 Setting up SUNO Prompt Generator...'); if(!require('fs').existsSync('.env')){require('fs').copyFileSync('.env.example','.env');console.log('✅ Created .env file - please add your API keys');}else{console.log('⚠️  .env already exists');} console.log('🔧 Run: npm run health-check');"
scripts.health-check: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const keys=['LASTFM_API_KEY','GOOGLE_API_KEY','ANTHROPIC_API_KEY','OPENAI_API_KEY']; console.log('🔑 API Key Status:'); keys.forEach(k=>console.log(k+': '+(process.env[k]?'✅':'❌'))); console.log('\n🚀 Start server: npm run dev');"
scripts.logs: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='./logs/pipeline.log'; if(fs.existsSync(path)){console.log(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8'));}else{console.log('📝 No log file found. Logs will be created when LOG_TO_FILE=true is set.');}"
scripts.clear-logs: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const dir='./logs'; if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true}); console.log('🗑️  Cleared all log files');}else{console.log('📁 No logs directory found');}"
